description: Solo challenge registry for the Three Doors / Kingdome of Hearts game. Each challenge has unlock conditions, a scene requirement, and a prize reward.

challenges.name: The King's Riddle
challenges.description: Reach the Kingdome Garden and answer the King's poem with truth.

challenges.name: Speedwalker
challenges.description: Reach the Kingdome Garden from the Moss Door in 4 or fewer choices.

challenges.name: Lorekeeper
challenges.description: Visit every sub-door at least once: Storybook, Cloverfield, Page of the Word, Page of the Egg, Page of the War, Lucky Door, Today Door, Tomorrow Door, Fog Door Return.

challenges.name: Glitch Hunter
challenges.description: Find the XP Door [GLITCHED] — a hidden sequence.
challenges.sequence_hint: Three rapid returns through the Fog Door may show you what others miss.

challenges.name: Xenon Navigator
challenges.description: Reach the Xenon Convergence and the End of Time in the same session.

challenges.name: Synthesasia in Threes
challenges.description: Recognize the pattern of three across three different scenes.
